_meta.description: Bulk / block / large deals for the LISTED standalone-health insurers, pulled from Moneycontrol → Markets → Stock Deals → Large Deals (per stock code, e.g. NBH = Niva Bupa). FALLBACK / second source behind Screener Trades for the Bulk / Block Deal Timeline: when Screener returns zero or incomplete rows (block deals are the usual gap), Moneycontrol fills it. Rows are normalised into the shared bulk/block-deal shape and merged + de-duped with Screener at read-time. Never fabricated — an empty data array means 'checked, nothing parseable', distinct from 'not yet checked'.
_meta.status_detail: Moneycontrol large-deals page was read and reported no bulk/block/large deals for the configured stock code(s).
_meta.notes: Niva Bupa stock code on Moneycontrol = NBH. www.moneycontrol.com is Akamai-fronted and 403s datacenter IPs; the API host (api.moneycontrol.com) is reachable but the exact stock-deals endpoint may need pinning via MONEYCONTROL_DEALS_API_NBH. Staging the large-deals HTML/JSON under data/raw/moneycontrol/deals/ populates it offline.
